valid.name: never-without-or-replace
with-or-replace

invalid.name: missing-or-replace

errors.message: Use `CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION` so re-running this migration does not abort with `relation already exists`.
Use `CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE` so re-running this migration does not abort with `relation already exists`.
Use `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW` so re-running this migration does not abort with `relation already exists`.

invalid.name: never-with-or-replace

errors.message: Avoid `CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION`; drop and re-create the object explicitly so unintended overwrites are surfaced.
Avoid `CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE`; drop and re-create the object explicitly so unintended overwrites are surfaced.
Avoid `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW`; drop and re-create the object explicitly so unintended overwrites are surfaced.
